title: Lunar Keystrokes
description: Add a custom keystrokes in your screen
body:
How To Use
This is a Keystrokes Like Lunar client. You can change Keystrokes position by typing /keystrokes.

You can change cps counter position by typing /cpsmod

You can change cps counter position by typing /fpsmod

 

FEATURES
W,A,S,D,Space Bar,Right mouse button,Left mouse button Available

Rainbow Keystrokes Available.
